channel.title: 简报 Jae Daily · 2026年05月06日
channel.description: 国际政治 · 宏观财经 · 前沿科技 · AI 辅助分析

item.title: [未译] The Download: a new Christian phone network, and debugging LLMs
item.description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. A new US phone network for Christians aims to bloc

item.title: [未译] Trump hard-pressed to get better Iran nuclear deal than Obama's
item.description: Talks to decisively end the war in Iran have stalled. Donald Trump has previously rejected any plan that doesn’t include an end to Tehran’s nuclear program, something experts say that Iran is unlikely

item.title: [未译] Security Advisory: Local privilege escalation in Lix and Nix
item.description: <p><a href="https://lobste.rs/s/g0crsm/security_advisory_local_privilege">Comments</a></p>

item.title: [未译] Las 130.000 firmas de Inmaculada contra la impunidad adolescente: Diego mató con 16 años a su hija Leticia Rosino y ha quedado libre a los 24
item.description: El asesino ha rechazado en prisión los cursos de reinserción y su familia sigue en el pueblo donde se produjo todo. Inmaculada Andrés lleva desde el cruel asesinato de su hija Leticia Rosino reuniendo

item.title: [未译] Google Home’s Gemini AI can handle more complicated requests
item.description: Google Home users can now ask Gemini to complete more complex, multi-step tasks and combine multiple tasks in a single command. Google has updated Gemini for Home to Gemi

item.title: [未译] Arsenal reach first Champions League final in 20 years after Saka goal beats Atletico
item.description: Arsenal is back in the Champions League final for the first time in 20 years thanks to a late first-half goal from Bukayo Saka that secured a 1-0 win over Atletico Madrid on Tuesday.

item.title: [未译] Apple could let you pick a favorite AI model in iOS 27
item.description: The next update to Apple's operating systems could allow users to choose their preferred AI model for running Apple Intelligence. According to Bloomberg's Mark Gurman, Ap

item.title: [未译] A blueprint for using AI to strengthen democracy
item.description: Every few centuries, changes in how information moves reshape how societies govern themselves. The printing press spread vernacular literacy, helping give rise to the Reformation and, eventually, repr

item.title: [未译] Super Micro stock jumps 18% on guidance beat as revenue more than doubles
item.description: Super Micro pointed to progress in U.S. manufacturing in issuing a stronger-than-expected quarterly forecast.

item.title: [未译] Tailoring AI solutions for health care needs
item.description: The AI market is full of big promises of grand transformation. Health care is a prime target for those promises, beset as it is by financial pressures, labor shortages, and the growing burden of carin

item.title: [未译] G7 trade ministers meet in Paris as global tensions and tariff threats mount
item.description: G7 trade ministers have gathered in Paris as global economic tensions intensify, with talks set to focus on critical minerals, industrial policy and trade resilience. The meeting comes against a backd

item.title: [未译] SAP bets $1.16B on 18-month-old German AI lab and says yes to NemoClaw
item.description: SAP plans to buy German AI startup Prior Labs and invest heavily in it. It is also prohibiting customers' agents use to a select few like Nvidia's NemoClaw.

item.title: [未译] EV maker Lucid suspends production guidance amid incoming CEO's business review
item.description: Lucid Group said it will make moves to better align its production with customer demand for its luxury all-electric vehicles.

item.title: [未译] Rubio says US military has completed offensive operations in Iran
item.description: The United States said on Tuesday that it had ended offensive operations against Iran, but warned it could unleash a “devastating” response to new threats in the Strait of Hormuz, as clashes and rival

item.title: [未译] OpenAI president forced to read his personal diary entries to jury
item.description: Elon Musk argued the journals show the moment when OpenAI abandoned its mission.

item.title: [未译] AMC to screen live concerts through Arena One partnership
item.description: More than 300 AMC locations in 89 markets across the U.S. will be programmed for live concert screenings. Tickets will range from $40 to $75.

item.title: [未译] As crypto cools, a16z crypto raises a $2.2B fund
item.description: As some of the biggest VCs in crypto start to consider funding AI startups, a16z crypto's new fund will stay the course.

item.title: [未译] Japanese PM Takaichi in push to revise pacifist constitution as regional tensions rise
item.description: Due to its wartime past, Japan adopted a pacifist Constitution that limits its military to self-defence. Now Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is calling for 'advanced discussions' on revising the Constit

item.title: [未译] Micron zooms past $700 billion market cap as rally in memory stocks accelerates
item.description: Micron has emerged as one of the most valuable U.S. tech companies thanks to insatiable demand for memory that's needed in AI chips.

item.title: [未译] Nigeria to evacuate citizens from South Africa after attacks
item.description: In tonight's edition, Nigeria is stepping in to bring its citizens home after fresh anti-immigration protests in South Africa. Also, Sudan is ramping up accusations after a series of drone strikes, in

item.title: [未译] ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet on his company’s monopoly: no one is coming for us
item.description: Christophe Fouquet, who became ASML's CEO in 2024 after more than a decade at the company, sat down with this editor on the rooftop deck of his Beverly Hills hotel Tuesday morning ahead of his appeara

item.title: [未译] EU, Armenia sign new partnership deals at first bilateral summit
item.description: The EU and Armenia held their first-ever bilateral summit, agreeing to foster closer economic ties as the former Soviet nation makes a cautious pivot towards the west. The two sides signed a new conn

item.title: [未译] Spirit starts monthslong process of dismantling airline after biggest collapse in a generation
item.description: Spirit Airlines was back in bankruptcy court to start dismantling the airline.

item.title: [未译] The West’s Caucasus circus: how has the Yerevan Summit looked from Moscow?
item.description: Helsinki has said the EU should be ready to reopen dialogue with Russia if US policy on the Ukraine conflict diverges from the bloc’s Read Full Article at RT.com

item.title: [未译] OpenAI claims ChatGPT’s new default model hallucinates way less
item.description: OpenAI's newest default model for ChatGPT might not make stuff up as much. Hallucinations have been an ongoing problem for AI models, but OpenAI says its new GPT-5.5 Inst

item.title: [未译] Google DeepMind Workers Vote to Unionize Over Military AI Deals
item.description: UK staff of Google’s AI research lab hope to block the use of the company’s artificial intelligence models in military settings.

item.title: [未译] Rose Farts and the Invisible Hand
item.description: In Modern Principles, Tyler and I show the invisible hand by telling the story of how the increase in oil prices in the 1970s encouraged millions of adjustments in how goods were produced and allocated, everything from an increased use of brick for d

item.title: [未译] Nuro receives driverless testing permit ahead of Uber robotaxi service launch
item.description: The Silicon Valley AV startup has not started driverless testing yet.

item.title: [未译] Bumble’s paying users are slipping as it bets on an overhaul later this year
item.description: The company is making a big bet that the swiping model is outdated and most matches never turn into actual dates. The company wants to fix that by redesigning profiles, changing how people interact, a

item.title: [未译] Altara secures $7M to bridge the data gap that’s slowing down physical sciences
item.description: Altara’s AI aims to diagnose failures and help speed up R&D by unifying data siloed across spreadsheets and legacy systems.
